body:
goodtransgirl:

Happy Time Zone, Alexandria Friends! 🖤

I hope you all are having a wonderful weekend! I think today’s plan is to go live on Twitch this evening for a first time in ages. The plan is either LttP or one of the Fire Red/Leaf Green Switch Re-Releases. I have to run some errands first but I’ll give you all a heads up when I get closer to a start time.

If you have thoughts, let me know and I’ll factor it into my decision on what to play. I’ve reached over 100 followers and so I owe you all a fun braless photo later. (Reminder: There will be no tags and it won’t be shareable, so should mostly only be found by the folks following me or browsing my blog directly, so keep an eye out. So a little treat for my followers. Although, mebbe with enough comments, ya’ll will convince me to reopen my page on the site for Loney Hams.)

So maybe I’ll see you around Tumblr or come hang out with me on Twitch when I’m live!

I hope you all have a wonderful day and I’ll see you around! 🖤🖤🖤

Life was life-ing today. I’m in for my monthly office visit tomorrow, but will try to be around later this week and hopefully stream eventually.
